author: sarah.chen
text: Decision: We'll use the new gateway SDK v3 directly instead of wrapping v2. The v3 SDK has native webhook support which eliminates the need for our custom webhook adapter. This increases MERC-220 scope slightly but saves us MERC-232 rework later.

author: tom.mueller
text: Decision: Batch processor (MERC-234) will use async message queue instead of synchronous processing. This adds complexity but we need it to handle the 10k+ daily transaction volume the client mentioned. Marcus is picking this up.

author: priya.sharma
text: Heads up: client called yesterday asking about multi-currency support. Product agreed to add it to Sprint 42. Created MERC-237 (Add currency conversion support, 5 SP). This wasn't in the original sprint plan — we're now at 78 SP committed vs our 35 SP velocity.

author: kenji.tanaka
text: FYI: PCI compliance audit is next week. We added MERC-227 (PCI compliance headers) to Sprint 42 mid-flight. Tom is handling it. Marking as urgent since the auditor needs to see these headers in staging by Wednesday.

author: sarah.chen
text: Blocker: The external fraud detection API vendor (FraudShield) pushed back their sandbox availability to March 24. MERC-229 is fully blocked — I can't even start the integration. Moving my focus to MERC-230 (webhook migration) instead.

author: lea.dubois
text: Raising a concern: Marcus currently has 7 tickets assigned in Sprint 42, including 3 marked Done that I can't find any PRs for (MERC-221, MERC-224). Can we redistribute some of his In Progress work? The error handling refactor (MERC-226) has been sitting with no review for 3 days.

author: priya.sharma
text: Client demo feedback from this morning: they love the reconciliation dashboard (MERC-231) direction but want the discrepancy view to highlight amounts > $1000 in red. Minor UI tweak, I'll fold it into the current PR.

author: kenji.tanaka
text: Reminder: I'm out Friday (March 13) for a personal appointment. MERC-235 (monitoring alerts) is blocked by MERC-230 anyway, so no impact. I'll finish the audit logging PR (#147) today before EOD.

author: tom.mueller
text: Shoutout to Sarah — the gateway SDK v3 integration (MERC-220) merged clean with 88% coverage. Solid foundation for the rest of the migration work. 🎉
